title: Junior UX Designer
description: Asana is hiring a Junior UX Designer to help teams work together more effectively through intuitive product experiences. You will work on user research, wireframing, and design iteration for features used by millions worldwide. This role provides mentorship and growth opportunities in a design-forward organization where your work directly impacts user satisfaction and productivity.
responsibilities: Conduct user research including interviews, surveys, and usability testing to understand user needs
Create wireframes and prototypes to explore design concepts and solutions
Collaborate with product managers and engineers to refine designs before development
Iterate designs based on user feedback and usage analytics
Document design decisions and create design specifications for engineering teams
Participate in design critiques and contribute to design system evolution

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Design, Computer Science, or related field
skills: Figma or similar design tools (XD, Sketch)
Basic understanding of UX principles and usability
Attention to visual and interaction detail

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and mental health coverage
Design education and conference attendance budget
Flexible remote work and unlimited PTO
